name: Grindrod Limited
summary: Grindrod Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides freight and logistics services in South Africa and internationally. The company operates through Port and Terminals, Logistics, and Group and Other segments. It engages in the road transportation of motor vehicles, petroleum products, and liquified gases; cross dock and warehousing, containerized cargo by rail and road, containerization of bulk commodities, road transportation of dry bulk commodities, and sale and leasing of new and used containers; and provision of depot services, as well as clearing and forwarding, and cross border facilitation services. The company also provides sea freight logistics services; ships agency, technical, maritime, marine and industrial engineering, cross border and project logistics, and container services; freight forwarding, customs brokerage, and related logistics services; and rail services, including consultancy, stock leasing and finance, and managing services. In addition, it offers international inbound and domestic leisure tourism services, as well as arranges conferences and events; operates ports and terminals; and provides stevedoring services comprising handling of bulk commodities, break bulk commodities, containers, and vehicles. Further, the company offers financial services comprising cash deposit management services; overdrafts, term loans and invoice discounting facilities, and mezzanine finance; originates and manages unlisted redeemable preference shares; issues notes; retail banking products and services; and property lending services. Additionally, it is involved in the private equity investment business. Grindrod Limited was founded in 1910 and is based in Durban, South Africa.
